executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Re-run only TC005 (Add Exercise to Section). The component now has data-testid="add-exercise-btn" on the add exercise button and data-testid="exercise-picker-dialog" on the exercise picker dialog. Use these data-testid selectors instead of xpath for more reliable element targeting. The app uses Thai language UI. Login with test@gmail.com / 292546 at http://localhost:3000. Navigate to /trainer/programs, open a program, expand a section, click the add exercise button, select an exercise from the picker, and verify it appears in the section.
